phases.details: Implement Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) pipelines for Florence-2 to adapt captioning outputs to custom corporate domains (e.g. medical tools, specialized factory machinery).
Develop native executable builds for Nvidia Jetson Orin Nano modules to run local vision pipelines directly on cheap edge hardware.
Integrate decentralized stream protocols (e.g., Livepeer) to guarantee end-to-end encrypted distribution of video feeds.
